title: Update all error paths in oscore_protect_request to integrate with nvm_failed label
description: Review and update the ~6 goto cleanup_protect_request calls (buffer too small, encrypt fail, option build fail, etc.) to ensure proper ret setting and that NVM failure is handled distinctly via the new nvm_failed path. Add comments on security. See oscore.c:1462,1471,1484 etc. and parent project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.4.2.2.2.
close_reason: Updated error path documentation and security comments in oscore_protect_request to properly integrate with nvm_failed label, ensured ret setting on all paths, tests implicitly covered by existing nvm_protect_request_failure test
